APPEARANCES- ATTY. CODY JAFFE OF SEVERSON & WERSON, TEL. NO. 398-3344 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANTS AND MOVING PARTIES;
NO OTHER APPEARANCE ON THE MATTER.

RULING - ATTY. JAFEE INFORMED THE COURT THAT HE WAS CONTESTING THE TENTATIVE RULING BUT FAILED TO GIVE NOTICE TO THE OTHER SIDE. THE COURT ADOPTED IT'S TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS - DEFENDANTS MERIDIAN MANAGEMENT GROUP, NORMAND GROLEAU, MICHELLE GROLEAU AND CAROL CAPPELLE'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT - BECAUSE PLAINTIFF HAS RAISED A TRIABLE ISSUE OF MATERIAL FACT AS TO HARRASSMENT, THE MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT AND THE MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION ARE DENIED AS TO ALL CAUSES OF ACTIONS EXCEPT CAUSE OF ACTION 6, AS TO WHICH THE MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS GRANTED.
